name: Apollo 14
left: Descent stage · ALSEP · flag · two golf balls
fact: Alan Shepard, the first American in space (1961), became the only person to play golf on the Moon. He smuggled a club head and two balls aboard. He claimed one 'went miles and miles' — LRO images suggest about 40 metres. Still: the furthest sporting achievement in history.
capability: Demonstrated highland landing — opened scientifically valuable terrain types previously considered too hazardous, a blueprint for non-mare Mars sites.
